requirement_topic.en: Senegal EV Policy Context vs Charger Approval
requirement_topic.zh: 塞内加尔 EV 政策背景与充电桩批准
requirement_topic.zht: 塞內加爾 EV 政策背景與充電樁批准

summary.en: Senegal climate, energy-transition, transport, and electrification policy can support EV charging demand, and MITTA announced a Regulatory Framework for Electric Mobility in July 2024 as EV policy context. Policy support should not be treated as a charger product approval, tax ruling, public-charging operating authorization, customs clearance decision, or Senelec connection approval. EV charger obligations remain tied to the concrete product, site, import route, tender, tariff, and operator model.
summary.zh: 塞内加尔气候、能源转型、交通和电气化政策可能支持充电需求，MITTA 于 2024 年 7 月公布的电动出行监管框架也属于 EV 政策背景。政策支持不应被视为充电桩产品批准、税务裁定、公共充电运营授权、海关放行决定或 Senelec 接入批准。充电桩义务仍取决于具体产品、场站、进口路径、招标、电价和运营模式。
summary.zht: 塞內加爾氣候、能源轉型、交通和電氣化政策可能支持充電需求，MITTA 於 2024 年 7 月公布的電動出行監管框架也屬於 EV 政策背景。政策支持不應被視為充電樁產品批准、稅務裁定、公共充電營運授權、海關放行決定或 Senelec 接入批准。充電樁義務仍取決於具體產品、場站、進口路徑、招標、電價和營運模式。

standards_or_laws: Senegal Nationally Determined Contribution transport and energy policy context
MITTA Regulatory Framework for Electric Mobility, July 2024
Senegal electricity-sector policy and CRSE-regulated operating context
Project tender or concession documents where applicable

summary.en: China policy support for new-energy vehicles and charging infrastructure is separate from technical conformity under GB/T 18487, GB/T 20234, and GB/T 27930. Domestic Chinese policy or subsidy eligibility does not establish Senegal product acceptance or a right to operate public charging.
summary.zh: 中国新能源汽车和充电基础设施政策支持，与依据 GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234 和 GB/T 27930 进行的技术合规相互独立。中国国内政策或补贴资格不构成塞内加尔产品接受或公共充电运营权。
summary.zht: 中國新能源汽車和充電基礎設施政策支持，與依據 GB/T 18487、GB/T 20234 和 GB/T 27930 進行的技術合規相互獨立。中國國內政策或補貼資格不構成塞內加爾產品接受或公共充電營運權。

standards_or_laws: China new-energy vehicle and charging-infrastructure policy context

gap.en: Keep the policy memo separate from the technical compliance file. For each Senegal project, identify whether public operation, billing, land use, electricity resale, tax incentives, import conformity, grid connection, or procurement rules create binding requirements beyond charger hardware testing.
gap.zh: 应将政策备忘录与技术合规文件分开。对每个塞内加尔项目，应识别公共运营、计费、用地、售电、税收激励、进口合格评定、并网或采购规则是否在充电设备硬件测试之外形成约束性要求。
gap.zht: 應將政策備忘錄與技術合規文件分開。對每個塞內加爾項目，應識別公共營運、計費、用地、售電、稅收激勵、進口合格評定、併網或採購規則是否在充電設備硬體測試之外形成約束性要求。

mandatory_status.target: Informational for product compliance unless a Senegal law, tax measure, tender, concession, CRSE/Senelec process, or public-charging authorization makes a requirement binding
mandatory_status.cn: Informational for export approval; Chinese policy support does not replace China technical conformity or Senegal acceptance

source.publisher: Ministere des Infrastructures, des Transports Terrestres et Aeriens (MITTA), Senegal

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EV policy is market context, not charger approval. Document the separate Senegal technical, import, grid, tariff, and operating approvals for each site.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EV 政策是市场背景，不是充电桩批准。应为每个场站单独记录塞内加尔技术、进口、电网、电价和运营批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EV 政策是市場背景，不是充電樁批准。應為每個場站單獨記錄塞內加爾技術、進口、電網、電價和營運批准。
